rationale: The cited paper appears only once in a grouped citation that lists prior applications of BSSVS in marketing. The citing paper does not engage Kim et al. (2012)'s segmentation model, results, or specific variable-selection setup when building its own theory, hypotheses, or estimation strategy. Instead, the core methodological grounding is attributed to general BSSVS sources, so this citation functions as illustrative background rather than a distinct intellectual dependency.
